Define Documentation

#define TRANSFORM_3DOBJECT (  func,
extype   ) 
 

Value:

_xobjc_align_obj3d( tree, ob, 1);                                   \
    if (_xobjc_init_type( tree, ob, func, extype, old_flags, env)) {    \
        _xobjc_align_obj3d( tree, ob, 0);                               \
        return 0;                                                       \
    }                                                                   \
    return 1;

#define TRANSFORM_OBJECT (  func,
extype   ) 
 

Value:

if (_xobjc_init_type( tree, ob, func, extype, old_flags, env))      \
        return 0;                                                       \
    return 1;
